retrieved_result: Batch Conversion of Excel to PDF - Updated! Acrobat article about converting Excel files to PDF, not about API integration.
Decision_Reason: The content focuses on batch converting Excel to PDF in Acrobat and contains no information about debugging APIs or API integration.
